docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $995.00 FILED BY YANKEE DOODLE DANDY, INC. (A CALIF. CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. [ MR. TED STOEBLING, DIST. MGR] ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO TED STOEBING DIST MGR UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANKEE DOODLE DANDY, INC. (A CALIF. CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC. $995.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.
